title: Unibond No More Nails Exterior Water Resistant Grab Adhesive Cartridge
features: High strength adhesive that eliminates the need for nails and screws in many DIY and repair jobs
Suitable for: Wood, Ceramic, Metal, Glass, Concrete, Brickwork, Plaster, Stone and most Plastics
Extremely versatile, offering superior bonding both inside and outside the home
description: From the manufacturer UniBond No More Nails For more than 100 years, the Henkel family of brands have been world leaders in professional grade adhesives and sealants. But Henkel products aren’t just for professionals. Tried, tested and proven by millions of customers worldwide, Henkel branded products have become the number one choice for DIYers in and around the home. The UniBond No More Nails range is the ultimate tool to make DIY easier. The range consists of a variety of adhesives which will help you to complete a range of jobs both inside and outside the house. These high strength adhesives have superior grab strength and eliminate the need for nails, screws and plugs in many DIY and repair jobs. No More Nails products are available in Cartridges, Tubes, Mini Tubes, Strips, Rolls and Easy Applicator. Why use UniBond No More Nails Waterproof Cartridge? UniBond No More Nails Waterproof provides unparalleled support for heavier objects and it is safe and easy to use. It is ideal for fixing post boxes, name plates, mirrors, bathroom fixtures and many other bonding applications inside and outside the home. Adheres to most building materials: wood, ceramic, metal, concrete, brick, stone, plaster and most plastics. How to use UniBond No More Nails Waterproof Cartridge: 1) Ensure surfaces are clean, dry and free from loose material, dust, oil, grease and polish. When bonding at least one surface must be porous. 2) Cut off the tip of the cartridge above the screw thread. 3) Screw on nozzle and cut nozzle to desired size. 4) Insert cartridge into cartridge gun. 5) Apply No More Nails to the item being bonded in continuous beads 15cm apart. 6) Position item with firm pressure and twisting slightly, ensure good contact before releasing pressure. You can reposition the bond up to 5 minutes after application. 7) Wipe away excess adhesive with white spirit. 8) Allow 24-48 hours for adhesive to dry before subjecting to additional load depending on temperature and substrate. UniBond No More Nails range: The UniBond No More Nails Range consists of a variety of adhesives to complete a range of jobs both indoors and outdoors: - UniBond No More Nails Original Cartridge for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Original Tube for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Original Mini Tube for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Original Easy Applicator for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Invisible Cartridge for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Invisible Tube for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Invisible Mini Tube for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Invisible Easy Applicator for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Waterproof for indoor and outdoor use - UniBond No More Nails Permanent Roll for indoor and outdoor use - UniBond No More Nails Permanent Roll for indoor use - UniBond No More Nails Permanent Strips for indoor and outdoor use - UniBond No More Nails Removable Strips for indoor and outdoor use

specifications_table.Usage: ‎Bonding to wood, ceramic, metal, glass, concrete, brickwork, plaster, stone, most plastics, mirrors
